name: Golf Envy
address: 210 N Citrus Ave C, Covina, CA 91723
about: Golf Envy is a private indoor golf membership club focused on providing a dedicated space for golfers to play and practice using advanced simulator technology. The facility features GolfZon TwoVision simulators, bringing world-renowned courses like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews to its members. Operating on a membership-only basis, it offers 24-hour access to climate-controlled bays, allowing golf to be played around any schedule. With a country club-like atmosphere, Golf Envy emphasizes a distraction-free environment focused solely on improving skills through high-precision technology and data analytics.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to private, climate-controlled golf bays
GolfZon TwoVision simulators with course-specific accuracy
Swing data analytics including spin rate, loft angle, and flight path
Exclusive member events and tournament opportunities
Distraction-free environment dedicated solely to golf

food_and_drink.notes: No food or beverages served; facility focuses solely on golf without distractions
No alcohol served; BYOB not mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulators used for course play and swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided or required. Members may need to bring their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the facility focuses solely on golf without food or beverage distractions. No outside food or drinks are mentioned as allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulators allow you to play 18 holes in under an hour, including time on world-renowned courses like Pebble Beach.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue appears to be an adult-oriented, private membership club focused on serious golf practice and events.
